items.name: accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal content.

items.name: alert
items.description: Displays a callout for important information.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Displays content within a desired ratio.

items.name: avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: button-group
items.description: Groups related buttons together.

items.name: calendar
items.description: A date field component that allows users to enter and edit dates.

items.name: card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: carousel
items.description: A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla.

items.name: chart
items.description: Beautiful charts built using Recharts. Copy and paste into your apps.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands and collapses a panel.

items.name: combobox
items.description: Autocomplete input and command palette with a list of suggestions.

items.name: command
items.description: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu for React.

items.name: context-menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a right click.

items.name: dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on the primary window, rendering content underneath inert.

items.name: direction
items.description: A provider to set the text direction for the application.

items.name: drawer
items.description: A drawer component for React built on top of Vaul.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

items.name: empty
items.description: Displays an empty state with an icon, title, and description.

items.name: field
items.description: A form field component with label, description, and message.

items.name: form
items.description: Building forms with React Hook Form and Zod.

items.name: hover-card
items.description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

items.name: input
items.description: Displays a form input field.

items.name: input-group
items.description: Groups input, button, and addon elements together.

items.name: input-otp
items.description: Accessible one-time password component with copy paste functionality.

items.name: item
items.description: A flexible item component for lists, menus, and settings.

items.name: kbd
items.description: Displays a keyboard shortcut or key combination.

items.name: label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: menubar
items.description: A visually persistent menu common in desktop applications.

items.name: native-select
items.description: A native HTML select element styled to match the design system.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.description: A collection of links for navigating websites.

items.name: pagination
items.description: Pagination with page navigation, previous and next links.

items.name: popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time.

items.name: resizable
items.description: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts with keyboard support.

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

items.name: select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from, triggered by a button.

items.name: separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

items.name: sidebar
items.description: A composable, themeable and customizable sidebar component.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: sonner
items.description: An opinionated toast component for React.

items.name: spinner
items.description: A loading spinner component.

items.name: switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between a checked and not checked state.

items.name: table
items.description: A responsive table component.

items.name: tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content that are displayed one at a time.

items.name: textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea.

items.name: toast
items.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

items.name: toaster
items.description: A toaster component to render toast notifications.

items.name: toggle
items.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when it receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it.

items.name: data-table
items.description: A powerful table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and column visibility powered by TanStack Table.

items.name: date-picker
items.description: A date picker component with calendar popover, supporting single date and date range selection.

items.name: typography
items.description: A set of typographic components for consistent text styling — headings, paragraphs, blockquotes, lists, and inline code.

items.name: search-bar
items.description: A search input with keyboard shortcut support, clear button, and command palette integration.

items.name: user-menu
items.description: A user profile dropdown menu with avatar, name, email, navigation links, and sign-out action.

items.name: stats-card
items.description: A metric card displaying a value with optional trend indicator, icon, and description.

items.name: filter-bar
items.description: A horizontal bar of toggleable filter chips with optional counts and a clear button.

items.name: share-dialog
items.description: A share dialog with copy-to-clipboard, social media links (X, LinkedIn, Email), and native share support.

items.name: notification-bell
items.description: A notification bell icon with unread count badge and a popover panel listing notifications.

items.name: file-upload
items.description: A drag-and-drop file upload zone with file list, size validation, and remove actions.

items.name: copy-button
items.description: A button that copies text to the clipboard with visual feedback on success.

items.name: status-indicator
items.description: A status dot with optional label indicating online, offline, busy, away, or live states.

items.name: timeline
items.description: A vertical timeline for displaying chronological events with mineral-colored dots.

items.name: pricing-card
items.description: A pricing tier card with plan name, price, feature list, CTA button, and optional highlight badge.

items.name: rating
items.description: An interactive star rating component with hover preview, read-only mode, and mineral gold accent.

items.name: use-mobile
items.description: A hook to detect if the current device is mobile.

items.name: use-toast
items.description: A hook for managing toast notifications.

items.name: utils
items.description: Utility functions including the cn classname helper.

items.name: observability
items.description: Structured logging, performance measurement, and error tracking with the [mukoko] prefix.

items.name: error-boundary
items.description: A React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a fallback.

items.name: section-error-boundary
items.description: Section-level error boundary for the 5-layer architecture with retry, named sections, and observability logging.

items.name: timeout
items.description: Promise timeout wrapper. Rejects with TimeoutError if an async operation exceeds the specified duration.

items.name: circuit-breaker
items.description: Netflix Hystrix-inspired circuit breaker with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN state machine, per-provider configs, and observability.

items.name: retry
items.description: Retry with exponential backoff, jitter, and configurable retry predicates.

items.name: fallback-chain
items.description: Sequential fallback strategy — try stages in order, return first success. Each stage has independent timeout.

items.name: ai-safety
items.description: AI safety utilities: input validation, prompt injection detection, adversarial security scanning, AI circuit breaker, output integrity validation, and Ubuntu cultural context layer.

items.name: accessibility
items.description: APCA 3.0 AAA accessibility utilities: contrast checking, pre-computed mineral Lc values, touch target constants, component checklist, and Ubuntu-informed design guidelines.

items.name: chaos
items.description: Chaos testing utilities for injecting random errors and latency to test resilience. Disabled by default.

items.name: lazy-section
items.description: TikTok-style sequential mounting component. FIFO queue ensures one section mounts at a time with memory reclaim.

items.name: use-memory-pressure
items.description: Monitor JS heap memory pressure via Performance Memory API. Chrome-only with graceful fallback.

items.name: architecture
items.description: Mukoko ecosystem architecture specification — local-first data strategy, cloud infrastructure, open data pipeline, and technology sovereignty assessment.

items.name: mukoko-sidebar
items.description: Standardized sidebar for all Mukoko ecosystem apps. Wraps the sidebar primitive with Mukoko branding, mineral accent strip, section-based navigation, and automatic active state detection. Works across docs, dashboards, settings, and any other context.

items.name: mukoko-header
items.description: Standardized sticky header for all Mukoko ecosystem apps. Includes logo with app name suffix, desktop navigation, theme toggle, and mobile sidebar trigger.

items.name: mukoko-footer
items.description: Standardized footer for all Mukoko ecosystem apps. Includes mineral color dots, product links grid, and Nyuchi branding.

items.name: mukoko-bottom-nav
items.description: Mobile-only bottom navigation bar for Mukoko ecosystem apps. Fixed to bottom with backdrop blur, active state indicator using mineral accent colors, and safe area padding.

items.name: detail-layout
items.description: Shared detail page layout for articles, events, and listings across the Mukoko ecosystem. Includes hero image, back navigation, metadata row, prose content area, and optional aside column.

items.name: dashboard-layout
items.description: Full app shell composing MukokoHeader, MukokoSidebar, and MukokoBottomNav into a responsive dashboard layout with collapsible sidebar and mobile navigation.

items.description: Full dashboard layout with stats, chart section, and activity feed.
